title: Yashh Advanced PVP Textures
description: Fully ReCreated ReDesigned Resorces make Gaming Experience more Smoother and Optimized
body:
# Yashh's Advanced Textures – FPS Friendly PvP Pack (1.21–1.21.11) I made this pack because most "PvP packs" out there are either too flashy or too bare. This one tries to hit a middle ground — cleaner visuals, less screen clutter, and actual performance gains without making the game look like a mod from 2013. Whether you're doing crystal PvP, survival, or just tired of how vanilla Minecraft looks, this should make things feel noticeably better. ![Yashh Penchi's Advanced Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e264eccccfcfbf553a4d9b9d22cdaf9420e3ba6.png)
![PfS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/137076ca04d5cfd5f444fb498670d4da563e1ab8.png) --- ## What's in it **Combat side:** - Low fire so you can actually see during fights - Toned-down shield and totem animations - Improved crystal textures for crystal PvP players - Cleaner item rendering so you're not squinting mid-fight **Visuals:** - Custom sun, moon, and particle effects - Reworked player skins with a smoother style - Custom title screen - Redesigned inventory UI — minimal, nothing distracting
`Combination of Multi Visual Packs` ![CrystelShowCase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73b6e294b523a705ae7fe4b4c7937ff600e871e7.gif) **Performance:** - Kept deliberately lightweight - Runs fine on low-end PCs - No heavy animations eating your frames **Other stuff:** - Reworked redstone textures - Custom elytra design - FullBright support - Small sound and animation tweaks ![InvShowcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bbe2866d82303b62747b67168849469b2d4b1eb7.gif) --- ## Compatibility Works on Minecraft 1.21 through 1.21.11. Tested on Feather and Lunar — should work on most PvP clients. Fine for multiplayer and survival servers too. --- ## Showcase ![HOTBAR SHOWCASE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/644fd94dd7552ff81a9bf67b1cf747fa38206c1d.gif) --- --- ## Contact 📧 Email: [iyash321@gmail.com](mailto:iyash321@gmail.com) ☕ Buy Me a Coffee: [buymeacoffee.com/yashh_labs](https://buymeacoffee.com/yashh_labs) If you find it useful, a follow or share helps more than you'd think. Thanks for checking it out.
